tasks.label: elasticsearch: install templates
tasks.command: curl -s -u elastic:${env:ELASTIC_PASSWORD} -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -X PUT http://localhost:9200/_index_template/kerio-connect-ecs --data-binary @elasticsearch/templates/kerio-connect-ecs-template.json && curl -s -u elastic:${env:ELASTIC_PASSWORD} -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -X PUT http://localhost:9200/_index_template/kerio-flow-template --data-binary @elasticsearch/templates/kerio-flow-template.json
